description:
Ketubba for Mubāraka bt. Binyamin (מבארכה) and [...] b. Aharon. Witnessed by Yosef b. Shemuel, Shelomo b. Yosef, Avraham b. Menaḥem, ʿEli b. David, Yehuyda b. Ṣedaqa and Elḥanan Av Bet Din (Elḥanan b. Shemarya, active 994-1026 CE). Dated the 5th day of the week (year is not preserved). The bride had previously been married. Payments: 5 + 5 = 10. Grand total: 80.

On verso there is a Judaeo-Arabic and Hebrew liturgical text, possibly a sermon or an extract from Saʿadya Gaʾon’s Siddur. The name ‘Saʿadya’ is written below. (Information from CUDL and Goitein's index card.)
